title: malva subovata
intro: Malva subovata, also known as the small mallow or dwarf mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of mucilages, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Malva subovata include soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Malva subovata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
